name: plugin-jira-markdown-exporter
description: Open-source Manifest V3 Chrome extension that exports Jira Cloud issues to clean Markdown. No telemetry, no API tokens — uses your existing browser session.
author: Adnan al Jawabra

scripts.zip: cd "$(dirname "$0")" 2>/dev/null; zip -r -FS dist/jira-markdown-exporter.zip manifest.json src icons -x '*.DS_Store' && echo 'Packaged dist/jira-markdown-exporter.zip'
